title: autobench.budget.gauge v1
description: Periodic budget telemetry emitted once per generation per active run. Provides a live view of request consumption and estimated remaining runway without triggering warning thresholds. Source: /autobench.

generation.description: Current generation number at time of emission.

requests_used.description: Cumulative LLM requests issued by this run so far.

max_requests.description: Optional. Configured maximum request budget. Null if uncapped.

estimated_remaining_generations.description: Optional. Estimated generations remaining at current request burn rate. Null if max_requests is uncapped or burn rate is zero.

cost_dollars_used.description: Optional. Estimated cumulative cost in USD at time of emission.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when this gauge snapshot was taken.
